hero.text: Seize the day, your potential is limitless.
hero.author: Unknown

aries.general: This is a great day for new beginnings; your energy will inspire those around you.
aries.love: Romantic sparks are likely to fly today; be open to opportunities.
aries.career: A unique opportunity may present itself at work; stay alert.

taurus.general: Stability will be your ally today; trust your instincts.
taurus.love: Communication with a partner will deepen your bond.
taurus.career: Focus on long-term goals instead of immediate rewards.

gemini.general: Your curiosity will lead to interesting discussions; engage with others.
gemini.love: Difficult conversations may arise; approach them gently.
gemini.career: Creative solutions are within reach; collaborate with a friend.

cancer.general: Emotional clarity is key; trust your feelings to guide your decisions.
cancer.love: A surprise gesture from a loved one will brighten your day.
cancer.career: Stay focused on your tasks, and don't let distractions steer you off course.

leo.general: Your confidence can lead to significant achievements; embrace it!
leo.love: Plan a fun outing to rekindle the romance.
leo.career: Your leadership skills will shine; others will look to you for guidance.

virgo.general: Attention to detail will pay off in unexpected ways today.
virgo.love: Be open to vulnerability; it can strengthen your relationship.
virgo.career: Organizational skills are in demand; tackle those projects.

libra.general: Seek balance in your life; it will help alleviate stress.
libra.love: Shared interests will bring you and your partner closer.
libra.career: Networking can lead to fruitful connections; be proactive.

scorpio.general: Your intensity will lead to breakthroughs; harness it wisely.
scorpio.love: Deep conversations will pave the way for understanding.
scorpio.career: Stay persistent; your hard work is about to pay off.

sagittarius.love: A romantic encounter may take you by surprise today.
sagittarius.career: Innovative ideas can set you apart from the crowd.

capricorn.general: Focus on your ambitions; success is within reach.
capricorn.love: A solid foundation will support a growing relationship.
capricorn.career: Professional boundaries will help maintain your integrity.

aquarius.general: Your unique perspective can spark enlightening discussions.
aquarius.love: Open-mindedness will enhance your romantic experiences.
aquarius.career: Collaboration will enhance creativity; partner up!

pisces.general: Embrace your intuition; it will guide you today.
pisces.love: Empathy will enrich your relationships; be there for loved ones.
pisces.career: Creative endeavors will be particularly rewarding; dive in!

professional.text: Success usually comes to those who are too busy to be looking for it.
professional.author: Henry David Thoreau

professional.text: Opportunities don't happen. You create them.
professional.author: Chris Grosser

professional.text: The future depends on what you do today.
professional.author: Mahatma Gandhi

professional.text: The only way to do great work is to love what you do.
professional.author: Steve Jobs

professional.text: Success is not the key to happiness. Happiness is the key to success.
professional.author: Albert Schweitzer

professional.text: What you get by achieving your goals is not as important as what you become by achieving your goals.
professional.author: Zig Ziglar

motivation.text: Believe you can and you're halfway there.
motivation.author: Theodore Roosevelt

motivation.text: Don’t watch the clock; do what it does. Keep going.
motivation.author: Sam Levenson

motivation.text: You are never too old to set another goal or to dream a new dream.
motivation.author: C.S. Lewis

motivation.text: The only limit to our realization of tomorrow will be our doubts of today.
motivation.author: Franklin D. Roosevelt

motivation.text: It does not matter how slowly you go as long as you do not stop.
motivation.author: Confucius

motivation.text: The way to get started is to quit talking and begin doing.
motivation.author: Walt Disney

captions.text: Hustle in silence and let your success make the noise.
captions.author: Unknown

captions.text: Make today so awesome that yesterday gets jealous.
captions.author: Unknown

captions.text: Do something today that your future self will thank you for.
captions.author: Unknown

captions.text: Dream big. Work hard. Stay focused.
captions.author: Unknown

captions.text: It’s a good day to have a good day!
captions.author: Unknown

tech.text: Technology is best when it brings people together.
tech.author: Matt Mullenweg

tech.text: Innovation distinguishes between a leader and a follower.
tech.author: Steve Jobs

tech.text: The science of today is the technology of tomorrow.
tech.author: Edward Teller

tech.text: The real opportunity for success lies within the person and not in the job.
tech.author: Zig Ziglar

tech.text: The best way to predict the future is to invent it.
tech.author: Alan Kay

tech.text: Any sufficiently advanced technology is indistinguishable from magic.
tech.author: Arthur C. Clarke

fun.text: Life is short. Smile while you still have teeth.
fun.author: Unknown

fun.text: I'm on a seafood diet. I see food, and I eat it.
fun.author: Unknown

fun.text: I used to be indecisive. Now I'm not so sure.
fun.author: Unknown

fun.text: Why don’t scientists trust atoms? Because they make up everything!
fun.author: Unknown

fun.text: I'm reading a book on anti-gravity. It's impossible to put down!
fun.author: Unknown

fun.text: If we aren't supposed to eat midnight snacks, why is there even a light in the fridge?
fun.author: Unknown

faith.text: Faith is taking the first step even when you don’t see the whole staircase.
faith.author: Martin Luther King Jr.

faith.text: Faith does not make things easy, it makes them possible.
faith.author: Luke 1:37

faith.text: Let your faith be bigger than your fear.
faith.author: Unknown

faith.text: Faith is the strength by which a shattered world shall emerge into the light.
faith.author: Helen Keller

faith.text: When you have faith, anything is possible.
faith.author: Unknown

wisdom.text: Knowing yourself is the beginning of all wisdom.
wisdom.author: Aristotle

wisdom.text: The only true wisdom is in knowing you know nothing.
wisdom.author: Socrates

wisdom.text: Be a voice, not an echo.
wisdom.author: Unknown

wisdom.text: The wise man does not lay up his own treasures. The more he gives to others, the more he has for himself.
wisdom.author: Lao Tzu

wisdom.text: The journey of a thousand miles begins with one step.
wisdom.author: Lao Tzu
